description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The design features a straight, medium-height backrest and squared armrests on both sides, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The seat includes two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear plush and comfortable. The chaise stands on four short, block-style legs, likely made of dark wood or a similar sturdy material. The upholstery is solid in color with subtle stitching details visible along the seams, contributing to its refined look. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater chaise with straight armrests, plush cushions, and block-style legs. The upholstery is solid and smooth, with subtle seam detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two seat cushions, two back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth, thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and the back sides of the cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other armrest and the chaise's overall depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium in height, and extends the full width of the chaise. It is unsegmented, with a smooth surface and subtle seam lines, lacking any tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, straight and squared, matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-shaped, and appear to be made of dark wood or a similar material, with a simple, sturdy design and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray fabric with no visible patterns, featuring subtle seam lines along the edges for a clean, modern look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all loose and rectangular, with an additional pair of smaller side cushions placed against each armrest.
